SORA-BRAVEHEART.description: At the start of your turn, if you have [gold]Riku's Link[/gold], gain 4 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
SORA-BRAVEHEART.flavor: A keyblade forged from bonds of courage.
SORA-BRAVEHEART.title: Braveheart
SORA-DESTINYS_EMBRACE.description: At the start of your turn, if you have [gold]Kairi's Link[/gold], heal 2 HP.
SORA-DESTINYS_EMBRACE.flavor: A flowery keyblade wielded by Kairi.
SORA-DESTINYS_EMBRACE.title: Destiny's Embrace
SORA-FENRIR.description: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Cloud's Link[/gold].
SORA-FENRIR.flavor: A heavy blade bearing a wolf's fang.
SORA-FENRIR.title: Fenrir
SORA-OBLIVION.description: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Riku's Link[/gold].
SORA-OBLIVION.title: Oblivion
SORA-OATHKEEPER.description: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Kairi's Link[/gold].
SORA-OATHKEEPER.flavor: A keyblade born of a treasured promise.
SORA-OATHKEEPER.title: Oathkeeper
SORA-WAYFINDER.flavor: A lucky charm to guide you home.
SORA-WAYFINDER.title: Wayfinder
SORA-STARLIGHT.flavor: A keyblade that shines with distant light.
SORA-STARLIGHT.title: Starlight
SORA-KINGDOM_KEY.description: Gain 2 [gold]SP[/gold] at the start of your turn. Gain 3 [gold]SP[/gold] when you attack.
SORA-KINGDOM_KEY.flavor: May Your Heart Be Your Guiding Key
SORA-KINGDOM_KEY.title: Kingdom Key
SORA-ULTIMA_WEAPON.title: Ultima Weapon
